allow: PowerShell($procs = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5174 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique; $procs | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Write-Host "Killed")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'Server returning: {d[\\"total\\"]} companies'\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'Total: {d[\\"total\\"]}'\); counts={}; [counts.update\({c['funding_stage']: counts.get\(c['funding_stage'],0\)+1}\) for c in d['companies']]; print\('Stages:', counts\)")
PowerShell(Get-WmiObject Win32_Process | Where-Object { $_.ProcessId -in @\(18984, 3172\) } | Select-Object ProcessId, Name, CommandLine)
